visible_public_consequences: Zootia public life visibly reflects the dominant populations listed in canon.
Secondary populations appear as durable resident blocs rather than polity-defining majorities.
institutional_visibility: Institutions and street-level expectations align with the canonical demographic balance.
adjacency_influence: Yuan-Ti remain the defining race, with Humans, Half-Elves, and Elves preserved as secondary populations through labor, trade, and imperial integration.
visitor_facing_observations: A visitor would notice the dominant bloc first, then the stable secondary populations and any explicit exclusions or shunned groups.
setting_use_summary: Use Zootia with the roster exactly as resolved in canon; do not broaden or soften exclusions without explicit corrective release.
